case_title: MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. VS GARCIA, ISABEL et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAENZ, ROSA L.
